steps: Harvest cells and wash in cold 1X PBS

Prepare fresh 2x Nuclear run-on buffer (NRO). ( 100 µL /sample) 10 mM Tris-HCl ph8 5 mM MgCl 2 300 mM KCl 1 mM DTT 500 μM ATP 500 μM GTP 500 μM 4-thio-UTP 2 μM CTP 200 μ/ml Superase-in 1% Sarkosyl (N-Laurylsarcosine sodium salt solution) Per library, use 1.5-2 x10^7 nuclei
Centrifuge 900 x g, °C, 6 minutes and resuspend using wide-end pipette tips in FB to a concentration of 2x10^7 nuclei per 10 μl of FB.
Nuclei can be stored at -80 °C for months.
Remove supernatant and resuspend in 10 mL of FB. Take 10 µL for cell count.
Flick to loosen pellet and resuspend in 25 mL of LyB. Centrifuge 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes
Incubate on ice for 00:05:00 Add 25 mL of LyB and centrifuge 600 x g, °C, 5 minutes .
Vortex lightly while adding 10 mL of LyB
Remove supernatant and resuspend in 10 mL GSB Volume of GSB should be at least 5 times the volume of cell pellet
Warm the NRO buffer at 30 °C .
Add 160 µL of chloroform, shake vigorously by hand for 00:00:15
Incubate 00:02:00 at Room temperature .
Centrifuge at 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 15 minutes .
Transfer upper, aqueous phase into new 1.5 mL centrifuge tube.
Add 400 µL of isopropanol to precipitate RNA and incubate at Room temperature for 00:10:00 . Can add 1-2 ul of 2 μg/μL glycogen to allow for visualization of pellet with lower RNA concentrations.
Centrifuge at 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Wash RNA pellet using 1 mL of cold 75 % ethanol Centrifuge at 12000 rpm, 4 °C, 10 minutes .
Completely remove ethanol and air-dry pellet. Dissolve in 100 µL of nuclease-free water.
Determine concentration by Nanodrop or Qubit.
Resuspend cells in 10 mL of ice-cold SB. Incubate for 00:05:00 . Spin 400 x g, °C, 10 minutes .
Mix 100 µL of thawed nuclei solution with 100 µL of 2xNRO buffer. Pipette up and down 15 times using end-cut pipette tip.
Incubate 00:07:00 at 30 °C .
Add 600 µL Trizol LS. Vortex. Incubate 00:05:00 at Room temperature . STOP POINT: Freeze with liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C
Thaw nuclei On ice . 5-10% drosophila nuclei can be added to your sample as spike-in if not using 4S-U labelled drosophila RNA in step 26.
Transfer 150 µg of RNA to a 1.5 ml tube and add water up to 500 µL . Save 5 μl of unfragmented RNA to be run on TapeStation as a control for fragmented RNA and to check quality of RNA.
Transfer 150 µg of fragmented RNA in one 2 ml Eppendorf tube. Use only polypropylene tubes during biotinylation.
Add appr. 800 µL of chloroform to the RNA-biotin in the 2 mL phase-lock tube and mix by manually shaking the tube.
Prepare Wash Buffer (WB): 100 mM Tris pH 7.5 10 mM EDTA pH 8.0 1M NaCl 0.1% (vol/vol) Tween-20
Use buffers provided with the RNA Clean and Purification kit-5 (Zymo Research). Add ethanol to wash and pre-wash buffers and resuspend DNAse in water.
Add 5-10% of labelled spike-in RNA if using instead of drosophila nuclei.
Fragment RNA using Bioruptor with the following settings using: 1 cycle: 30 sec / 30 sec ON / OFF at high settings.
Transfer fragmented RNA to 2 ml tube.
Analyze fragmentation efficiency of fragmented versus unfragmented RNA on Agilent 2200 TapeStation.
Sonicated RNA can be snap-frozen in liquid nitrogen and stored at -80 °C
Incubate in the dark at 24 °C and 800 rpm, °C, for 02:00:00 .
Libraries can be prepared with NEBNext Ultra II Directional RNA Library Prep or other library prep kits.
Measure concentration of labelled RNA by Qubit fluorometer.
Repeat steps 57-58 and collect the eluted RNA in the same tube ( 200 µL total volume).
Prepare Biotin-RNA mix in 2 ml tube. Follow the order: up to 150 μg of fragmented RNA in 500 µL 100 µL Biotinylation Buffer 200 µL DMF 200 µL EZ-link HPDP Biotin
Incubate RNA at 65 °C for 00:10:00 , then On ice for 00:05:00 .
Transfer tubes to the magnetic rack. Collect the 4-thio-labeled RNA in a new tube.
Resuspend beads in in 100 µL of 100 mM DTT and incubate 00:05:00 .
Wash at least 3 times with 900 µL of room temperature WB.
Wash at least 3 times with 900 µL of warm ( 65 °C ) WB.
Transfer tubes to a magnetic rack. Remove supernatant. Do not disturb beads.
Incubate at 4 °C for 00:15:00 in rotation.
Add 100 µL of prepared Invitrogen streptavidin beads to 200 µL of RNA-biotin.
Increase the volume of the solution of RNA-biotin to 200 µL with nuclease-free water. Can also scale down to 100 μL if you have less than 150 μg and use 50uL of beads.
Incubate at 65 °C for 00:10:00 . Place on ice for 00:05:00 .
Prepare the M280 Streptavidin Dynabeads:
Take 100 µL of beads per sample.
Wash the beads twice with 2 volumes ( 200 µL per sample) of wash buffer.
Resuspend in 1 Volume ( 100 µL per sample) of wash buffer.
Leave half volume of WB at Room temperature and heat the other half at 65 °C .
Resuspend RNA in 100 µL of nuclease-free water. Biotinylated RNA can be stored at -80 °C .
Spin quickly at 4 °C and remove remaining supernatant with 200 μl and 10 μl pipettes. Biotinylated RNA should NOT dry.
Remove supernatant.
Wash pellet with 1 mL of ice-cold 75% ethanol. Centrifuge 10006 x g, 4 °C, 30 minutes .
Remove supernatant.
Centrifuge 16000 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes .
Add 6 µL DNase/RNase-Free Water directly to the column matrix, incubate for 00:01:00 and centrifuge for 00:00:30
Centrifuge for 00:01:00 at full speed to ensure complete removal of the wash buffer. Transfer the column carefully into an RNase-free tube.
Add 1 volume (1 ml) of isopropanol and mix for 00:00:15 manually.
Add 1/10 volume (100 μl) of 5 M NaCl and mix. If needed at 1-2 μL of 2 μg/μL Glycogen to allow for visualization of pellet with lower RNA concentrations.
Transfer upper phase into new tube (appr 1 mL).
Centrifuge at 4 °C and 16000 x g, °C, 00:05:00
Add 400 µL RNA Wash Buffer to the column and centrifuge for 00:02:00 . Discard the flow-through.
Add 700 µL RNA Wash Buffer to the column and centrifuge for 00:00:30 . Discard the flow-through.
Add 400 µL RNA Prep Buffer to the column and centrifuge for 00:00:30 . Discard the flow-through.
Add 40 µL reaction mix directly to the column matrix. Incubate at Room temperature for 00:15:00 .
Add 400 µL of RNA Binding Buffer to each sample and mix.
Add 600 µL of ethanol (95-100%) and mix.
Transfer the sample to the Zymo-Spin IC Column in a Collection Tube and centrifuge for 00:00:30 . Discard the flow-through.
Add 400 µL of RNA Wash Buffer to the column and centrifuge for 16000 x g, °C, 30 seconds . Discard the flow-through.
For each sample to be treated, prepare DNase I reaction mix in an RNase-free tube. Mix well by gentle inversion: 5 µL DNase I 35 µL DNA Digestion Buffer
creator: Elisa Barbieri
